title: Yunji reports 2H results
content:
* Yunji press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20453655-yunji-announces-second-half-and-fiscal-year-2025-unaudited-financial-results] (YJ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/YJ]): 2H total revenues were RMB158.7 million (US$22.7 million), compared with RMB183.8 million in the same period of 2024. The change was primarily due to the Company's continued strategy to refine its product selection across all categories and optimize its selection of suppliers and merchants, together with a deliberate scale-back of the marketplace business.Repeat purchase rate in the twelve months ended December 31, 2025 was 69.7%.
 	* EPS of RMB0.02, compared with RMB0.06 in the same period of 2024.

MORE ON YUNJI
